import pandas as pd


def load_large_dataset(path):
    chunks = pd.read_csv(path, chunksize=50_000)
    return pd.concat(chunks, ignore_index=True)


def process_big_file(filepath):
    total = 0
    for chunk in pd.read_csv(filepath, chunksize=10_000):
        total += chunk["value"].sum()
    return total


def read_sample(path):
    return pd.read_csv(path, nrows=1000)
